TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_unrokay, title = unrokay, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/unrokay} }

S.FORM: unrokay ga p'asun ci na ryax, khmey ci cyoli' mwah tisal alang myan. mtenah cyamin ro myugiy myan uy. piyux ci 'nabu nya wa myan galun. kwara yaba,yaya,uba,uya ro suyan, sswe myan ga, tmwan mwah pcpung mtenah uy. ssya'an ro me'es myan ci kwara utux ryax soni.

unrokay ga p'asun ci na ryax, khmey ci cyoli' mwah tisal alang myan. mtenah cyamin ro myugiy myan uy. piyux ci 'nabu nya wa myan galun. kwara yaba,yaya,uba,uya ro suyan, sswe myan ga, tmwan mwah pcpung mtenah uy. ssya'an ro me'es myan ci kwara utux ryax soni.
S.PHON: unrokaj ɣa pʔas~ɕun ʦ~ʨi na rjax, kħmej ʦ~ʨi ʦ~ʨjoliʔ mwaħ tis~ɕal alaŋ mjan. mtenaħ ʦ~ʨjamin ro mjuɣij mjan uj. pijux ʦ~ʨi ʔnaβu nja wa mjan ɣalun. kwara jaβa,jaja,uβa,uja ro s~ɕujan, s~ɕs~ɕwe mjan ɣa, tmwan mwaħ pʦ~ʨpuŋ mtenaħ uj. s~ɕs~ɕjaʔan ro meʔes~ɕ mjan ʦ~ʨi kwara utux rjax s~ɕoni.
